programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Stop-Loss
programme.desc: His tour of duty in Iraq finally over, Staff Sgt. Brandon King returns home to Brazos, Texas, ready to re-enter civilian life. Unexpectedly, the Army invokes a clause in Brandon's military contract, requiring him to return to active duty in Iraq. With the help of close friend Michele, Brandon goes AWOL and struggles to find a way out of the dilemma.

programme.title: The Presidio
programme.desc: Ex-military policeman Jay Austin (Mark Harmon) is now a San Francisco detective. When his former MP partner is killed at a military base, he takes the case. But after arriving at the crime scene, he realizes he must look to his old rival, Lt. Col. Alan Caldwell (Sean Connery), for help. Austin then falls for Caldwell's daughter, Donna (Meg Ryan), further complicating matters. Still, the two men pu

programme.title: The Dictator
programme.desc: Gen. Aladeen (Sacha Baron Cohen) has ruled the oil-rich North African country of Wadiya since the age of six, when 97 stray bullets and a hand grenade killed his father in a hunting accident. After an assassination attempt takes the life of yet another body-double, Tamir (Ben Kingsley), Aladeen's uncle and most trusted adviser, convinces Aladeen to go to New York. Unfortunately, Aladeen has a less

programme.title: Jeff, Who Lives at Home
programme.desc: When Jeff (Jason Segel) leaves his mother's basement to buy wood glue at the store, he looks for signs from the universe to determine his path. However, a series of unexpected and amusing events leads him to cross paths with his family, especially his brother (Ed Helms), in the strangest of circumstances and locations. If Jeff is very lucky and universally blessed, he will find the meaning of his

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Masterminds
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: Aging pals Billy (Michael Douglas), Paddy (Robert De Niro), Archie (Morgan Freeman) and Sam (Kevin Kline) have been best friends since childhood. When Billy finally proposes to his much-younger girlfriend, all four friends go to Las Vegas to celebrate the end of Billy's longtime bachelorhood and relive their glory days. However, the four quickly realize that the intervening decades have changed Si

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Pittsburgh boxers Billy "The Kid" McDonnen (Robert De Niro) and Henry "Razor" Sharp (Sylvester Stallone) shared a fierce rivalry back in the 1980s. Each had scored a victory in two matches, but on the eve of their decisive third bout, Henry suddenly announced his retirement, effectively ending both boxers' careers. Thirty years later, boxing promoter Dante Slate Jr. (Kevin Hart) makes Billy and He

programme.title: Buddy Games
programme.desc: After a falling out, six lifelong friends reunite to play the buddy games -- an insane competition filled with absurd physical and mental challenges. Now, all bets are off, as the determined pals fight, claw and party for the chance to win $150,000.

programme.title: Buddy Games: Spring Awakening
programme.desc: Faced with their biggest challenge yet, the gang sets out to honor a lost pal, only to find themselves in the middle of where it all began -- spring break. They soon learn their old school ways of partying can hardly compete with today's generation.

programme.title: Piranha
programme.desc: Spring break turns gory when an underground tremor releases hundreds of prehistoric, carnivorous fish into Lake Victoria, a popular waterside resort. Local cop Julie Forester (Elisabeth Shue) must join forces with a band of unlikely strangers -- though they are badly outnumbered -- to destroy the ravenous creatures before everyone becomes fish food.

programme.title: Into the Wild
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors
programme.desc: In a walled city, a troubled youth stumbles upon a chaotic world of crime. Chinese crime thriller with subtitles.

programme.title: Drunken Master II
programme.desc: A young martial artist is caught between respecting his pacifist father's wishes or stopping a group of disrespectful foreigners from stealing precious artefacts.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of the Cinema List. From Footloose to The Italian Job, revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Action-packed superhero film starring Vin Diesel as Ray Garrison, a soldier killed in action and brought back to life as a super-human.

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: A streetwise 14-year-old discovers he can transform into a superhero by shouting one word- Shazam! Action based on the DC Comics character.

programme.title: Kraven The Hunter
programme.desc: Aaron Taylor-Johnson is Kraven, the deadly supervillain on a path to become the greatest - and the most feared - hunter in the world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final..
programme.desc: ...Reckoning. Ethan Hunt and the team race to find the Entity as Tom Cruise stars in the franchise's last outing.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, a man enters a deadly televised competition. Edgar Wright directs.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Gerard Butler plays the bodyguard tasked with saving the president when a North Korean mob storms the White House.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The iconic lizard explodes onto screens as he wreaks havoc on the streets of New York. Can scientist Matthew Broderick find a way to stop the carnage.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Gal Gadot stars as an Amazon warrior princess who leaves her hidden island home to fight in the Great War.
Spartan king Gerard Butler leads his brave elite warriors against the all-conquering Persian invaders. Strong violence.

programme.title: Retribution
programme.desc: While driving his kids to school, Berlin-based American businessman Liam Neeson learns that his vehicle is rigged with explosives. Sky Original high-octane thrill ride.

programme.title: American Night
programme.desc: A highly coveted Andy Warhol painting re-surfaces, triggering a battle between an art dealer and a ruthless mafia boss. Sky Original film with Jonathan Rhys Meyers.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum to bring glory back to Rome. BAFTA-nominated long-awaited sequel to Ridley Scott's historical epic.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The iconic lizard explodes onto screens as he wreaks havoc on the streets of New York. Can scientist Matthew Broderick find a way to stop the carnage.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: A biochemist with a rare blood disease inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism. Marvel action with Jared Leto.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, a man enters a deadly televised competition. Edgar Wright directs.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Action man Brendan Fraser goes head-to-head with the undead remains of High Priest Imhotep. All-out action with Rachel Weisz. Contains violence and flashing images.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: Recently widowed Bridget enters the dating game once again, caught between her son's science teacher and a man 20 years her junior. Romantic comedy, starring Renee Zellweger, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Hugh Grant, Leo Woodall and Colin Firth.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: Down-on-his-luck suburban dentist Nicholas Oseransky is horrified to discover his new neighbour is a former hitman, who is now in hiding after turning evidence against gangland bosses. When his wife convinces him to contact the Mob to try to extort money in exchange for revealing the crook's location, Nicholas finds himself out of his depth and in mortal danger. Comedy, with Matthew Perry, Bruce W

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A writer struggling to complete the script for a movie about psychopathic killers turns to his criminal friends for advice. He ends up getting more than he bargained for when the small-time crooks kidnap a dog that belongs to a gangster, putting all their lives in danger. Comedy thriller, starring Colin Farrell, Sam Rockwell, Christopher Walken and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Boozy playboy Arthur Bach is content to drift through life without ambition and await the multimillion-dollar inheritance due to him following an arranged high-society wedding. However, on the threshold of the nuptials, Arthur falls for a penniless shoplifter and begins to doubt whether he wants to go through with the ceremony. Comedy, starring Dudley Moore, Liza Minnelli and an Oscar-winning John

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughter's wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan,

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: It's five years since Sophie invited her three possible dads to her wedding, and now most of her family are reunited as she prepares for the grand reopening of the Hotel Bella Donna. Along the way, she learns more about her mother's past. Abba-themed musical sequel, starring Amanda Seyfried, Lily James, Pierce Brosnan, Cher and Andy Garcia.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. As she is not exactly catwalk material, a veteran British coach is brought on board to oversee her transformation into a glamorous beauty queen. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: A failed rock star carves out a career as a popular wedding singer, but his hopes for a bright future are dashed when his fiancee jilts him at the altar and he tries to shut himself off from the outside world. At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barr

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rival's crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lind

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon pretends to be unhappily married to seduce women. When his girlfriend finds his prop wedding ring, he claims he is getting a divorce and has to persuade his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife, but is forced to come up with yet more lies to maintain the illusion. Romantic comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Jennifer Aniston and Nicole Kidman.

programme.title: About Last Night
programme.desc: A couple are determined to leave Chicago's cut-throat singles scene behind them and develop a stable relationship together - despite their seemingly insurmountable commitment difficulties. Romantic drama based on the play by David Mamet, starring Demi Moore, Rob Lowe, James Belushi, George DiCenzo and Elizabeth Perkins.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Cute furball Gizmo is reunited with his human friends Billy and Kate, who now work in the New York offices of an eccentric tycoon. However, it is not long before Gizmo has spawned a new generation of murderous carnivores, who quickly overrun the building - and a genetics lab where they produce even more startling mutations. Joe Dante's comedy sequel, starring Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, John Glov

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Boozy playboy Arthur Bach is content to drift through life without ambition and await the multimillion-dollar inheritance due to him following an arranged high-society wedding. However, on the threshold of the nuptials, Arthur falls for a penniless shoplifter and begins to doubt whether he wants to go through with the ceremony. Comedy, starring Dudley Moore, Liza Minnelli and an Oscar-winning John

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Two men dismissed from the police become security guards, but are forced to go on the run when they uncover a sophisticated smuggling operation. With the criminal gang and the LAPD both chasing them, the unlikely partners seem more intent on fighting each other than covering their tracks. Action comedy, starring Martin Lawrence, Steve Zahn, Colm Feore and Eric Roberts.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Dim male model Derek Zoolander is stunned to find his career going downhill thanks to the arrival of an equally vacuous rival - but fails to realise he is merely a pawn in a dangerous game of international espionage and world domination. Comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Owen Wilson, Will Ferrell, Milla Jovovich, Christine Taylor and David Duchovny.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: A family tragedy woos Delia Deetz, daughter Lydia and rebellious teenage granddaughter Astrid back to the close-knit community of Winter River. Astrid accidentally opens a portal to the afterlife by summoning Beetlejuice three times. The mischievous demon ricochets between realms, wreaking havoc wherever he goes. Tim Burton's comedy sequel, starring Michael Keaton, Winona Ryder and Jenna Ortega.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers.

programme.title: Plainclothes
programme.desc: A promising undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies professional orders when he falls in love with a target. Language/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: As part of a dog patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, Lang bonds with a black stray. Chinese drama with subtitles.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: A dyslexic teen, misunderstood and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Icelandic romantic drama. Spanning several decades, a man embarks on an emotional journey to find his first love who disappeared 50 years ago.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: A dyslexic teen, misunderstood and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: When two young men cross paths in Berlin, a simple afternoon in the big city soon takes on a much greater meaning. Heartfelt drama.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: In 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal.

programme.title: Regretting You
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must grapple with what's left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Julia Roberts plays the gutsy mum who takes on a corporation polluting local water. Oscar winner from Steven Soderbergh, with the late Albert Finney. Strong language.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A matchmaker is torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex. Romcom with Pedro Pascal and Chris Evans.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: When their enemy resurfaces after 16 years, a group of ex-revolutionaries reunite to rescue the daughter of one of their own.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: A dyslexic teen, misunderstood and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Icelandic romantic drama. Spanning several decades, a man embarks on an emotional journey to find his first love who disappeared 50 years ago.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: When two young men cross paths in Berlin, a simple afternoon in the big city soon takes on a much greater meaning. Heartfelt drama.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Two best friends have their relationship tested when one of them falls ill with cancer. Drama with Toni Collette and Drew Barrymore.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: A couple start to unravel after welcoming the lead actor in a movie about their notorious romance into their home. Sky Original with Julianne Moore and Natalie Portman.

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: Powerful drama about a troubled Brooklyn teen aimlessly drifting through summer while struggling to come to terms with his own desires. From Sundance winner Eliza Hittman.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Julia Roberts plays the gutsy mum who takes on a corporation polluting local water. Oscar winner from Steven Soderbergh, with the late Albert Finney. Strong language.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A matchmaker is torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex. Romcom with Pedro Pascal and Chris Evans.

programme.title: Scarygirl
programme.desc: When her world is shrouded in darkness, a young girl must travel to the mysterious city of light. Animated fantastical adventure. Mature themes/flashing images.

programme.title: Fox & Hare Save The Forest
programme.desc: Fox and Hare discover that Owl is missing. They set out with their friends to find him, but instead discover the mysterious lake. Animated adventure.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy has lots of little problems as he tries to mind a classful of riotous kiddies. Hyperactive family comedy with Steve Zahn and Anjelica Huston.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Quvenzhane Wallis, Jamie Foxx and Cameron Diaz star in this adaptation of the classic musical about a foster kid taken in by a wealthy businessman. Flashing images.

programme.title: Smallfoot
programme.desc: An epic journey ensues when a Yeti named Migo stumbles across a real human being - but is banished from his snowy home when no-one believes him. With Channing Tatum.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A man and his dog are fused together to turn into Dog Man. They must stop a cat from cloning himself and creating an evil kitten.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: Animated comedy about a youngster concerned that his baby brother is actually a power-hungry tycoon sent to destroy his perfect family life.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home. Delightful big-screen adaptation of the beloved books.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: When everyone's favourite marmalade-loving bear is framed, the Brown family must fight to clear his name. Top family sequel with Hugh Grant.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: The Oscar-winning musical epic about the untold story of the Witches of Oz makes its debut on the big screen, starring Cynthia Erivo and Ariana Grande.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything they've faced before.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is mistaken for a secret agent when a hi-tech tux turns him into a superspy. Jennifer Love Hewitt stars in a gadget-packed action comedy.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking
programme.desc: Smash-hit comedy following a single mother on her search for the perfect husband and father to baby Mikey (voiced by Bruce Willis). With John Travolta. Strong language.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Lee Evans and Nathan Lane are the bumbling brothers whose plans to renovate a valuable building are thwarted by a super smart rodent. Comedy with Christopher Walken.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for
programme.desc: SpongeBob journeys to the ocean's depths to face the Flying Dutchman's ghost, encountering challenges and uncovering marine mysteries.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A man and his dog are fused together to turn into Dog Man. They must stop a cat from cloning himself and creating an evil kitten.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: Animated comedy about a youngster concerned that his baby brother is actually a power-hungry tycoon sent to destroy his perfect family life.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: When everyone's favourite marmalade-loving bear is framed, the Brown family must fight to clear his name. Top family sequel with Hugh Grant.

programme.title: About Last Night
programme.desc: Struggling to balance their desire for sex and love, two single guys start a courtship that questions motives. Based on David Mamet's play Sexual Perversity in Chicago.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: King Arthur finds himself in danger of losing his wife Guinevere to the once-loyal Sir Lancelot. Medieval epic with Sean Connery, Richard Gere and Julia Ormond.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone is the cop brought out of deep freeze in 2032 to hunt down his criminal enemy Wesley Snipes. Sci-fi action with Sandra Bullock. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: King Arthur finds himself in danger of losing his wife Guinevere to the once-loyal Sir Lancelot. Medieval epic with Sean Connery, Richard Gere and Julia Ormond.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Wise-cracking Miami cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence fight to protect a witness and bring down a heroin crook. Action comedy.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone is the cop brought out of deep freeze in 2032 to hunt down his criminal enemy Wesley Snipes. Sci-fi action with Sandra Bullock. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Veteran cop Danny Glover and maverick Mel Gibson team up to thwart drug-smugglers. Strong language/violence/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Rapid-fire action sequel with Mel Gibson and Danny Glover as the bickering cops closing the net on a mob of South African drug smugglers. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon III
programme.desc: Tough cops Riggs and Murtaugh (Mel Gibson and Danny Glover) return for another all-action adventure in which they must confront a former cop turned crime lord.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Mel Gibson and Danny Glover return to trade bullets with Triad kingpin Jet Li. Joe Pesci, Rene Russo and Chris Rock get in on the action. Strong language/violence.(122mins).

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: CIA agent Harrison Ford becomes the target of an IRA revenge plot after he foils a terrorist attack. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Falling Down
programme.desc: Joel Schumacher's darkly comic thriller stars Michael Douglas as a laid-off worker who finally gets pushed too far. Strong language/violence/stereo sound only.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Married Michael Douglas has a one-night stand with Glenn Close, but the bunny-hating harpy isn't ready to say goodbye. Thriller. Contains violence/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Day Of The Jackal
programme.desc: When meticulous hitman Edward Fox is hired to kill the French president, detective Michael Lonsdale faces a race against time to track him down. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: CIA agent Harrison Ford becomes the target of an IRA revenge plot after he foils a terrorist attack. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon III
programme.desc: Tough cops Riggs and Murtaugh (Mel Gibson and Danny Glover) return for another all-action adventure in which they must confront a former cop turned crime lord.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Mel Gibson and Danny Glover return to trade bullets with Triad kingpin Jet Li. Joe Pesci, Rene Russo and Chris Rock get in on the action. Strong language/violence.(122mins).

programme.title: Naked Gun: From The Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Leslie Nielsen stars as incompetent cop Frank Drebin, who is out to stop a plot to assassinate the Queen. Top slapstick comedy. Flashing images.

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: A professional hitman lets his emotional detachment slip when his mentor is murdered, and puts his deadly skills to the task of getting revenge. The solitary assassin finds an ally in his teacher's son, who also yearns for vengeance and persuades the killer to teach him the tricks of the trade. Action thriller remake, starring Jason Statham, Ben Foster and Donald Sutherland.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving the crew of the disabled vessel trapped at the bottom of the Pacific. Rescue diver Jonas Taylor is hired to save the crew from a 75ft-long prehistoric shark, known as the Megalodon. Director Jon Turteltaub's action thriller, starring Jason Statham, Bingbing Li, Rainn Wilson and Ruby Rose.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A single woman begins a new year with resolutions to find love, quit her bad habits and take a step up the career ladder. Her plans crumble as she tries to deal with her mother's infidelity, get over a passionate fling with her boss and come to terms with her feelings for an uptight lawyer. Romantic comedy based on Helen Fielding's novel, starring Renee Zellweger, Hugh Grant and Colin Firth.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. However, when the couple start to squabble over their personal habits, she decides to decamp for a while to Thailand and write a travelogue. Unfortunately, she has reckoned without the reappearance of a duplicitous old flame - and a spell behind bars in a Thai prison. Romantic comedy sequel, with Renee Zellweger, Coli

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Bridget's focus on single life and her career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch - she can only be 50 per cent sure of the identity of her baby's father after a pair of one-night stands. Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: Recently widowed Bridget enters the dating game once again, caught between her son's science teacher and a man 20 years her junior. Romantic comedy, starring Renee Zellweger, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Hugh Grant, Leo Woodall and Colin Firth.

programme.desc: Kabir Khan, disgraced ex-captain, coaches the struggling Indian Women's Hockey team. He aims to unite them, instilling pride and belief to achieve victory for India.

programme.title: Tiger 3
programme.desc: Tiger and Zoya return to save their country and family. This time, the danger is personal, pushing them to confront fierce enemies and surprising loyalties. Duty, love, courage tested.

programme.title: Jo Tera Hai Who Mera Hai
programme.desc: A heartfelt story of friendship, trust, and sacrifice where relationships are tested by ambition and ego. It captures the essence of loyalty and the cost of choices in human connections.

programme.title: MS Dhoni - The Untold Story
programme.desc: M S Dhoni, a boy from Ranchi, aspires to play cricket for India. Though he initially tries to please his father by working for the Indian Railways, he ultimately decides to chase his dreams.

programme.title: Race 2
programme.desc: Ranvir treads through the world of the Indian mafia in Turkey as he looks to avenge the death of his lover and partner-in-crime.

programme.title: Motichoor Chaknachoor
programme.desc: Anita dreams of marrying a foreign-settled man. She chooses Pushpinder, a Dubai-returned bachelor desperate for a bride, but their expectations clash in hilarious and heartfelt ways.

programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: Raju, Shyam, and Baburao's lives take a turn when a fraudster cheats them, forcing them to find a new way to repay a dangerous gangster's loan.

programme.title: Dream Girl 2
programme.desc: Karam secretly turns his female alter ego into a dancer and woos a millionaire''s son in hopes of clearing his family debts and impressing his fiancee''s father.

programme.title: Chennai Express
programme.desc: A man's train journey turns chaotic when he helps a runaway bride from a powerful family. Their adventurous ride across South India blends comedy, action, and vibrant cultural charm.

programme.title: Dhoom 3
programme.desc: A circus performer turns to crime to avenge his father's humiliation, facing off against a relentless cop. High-octane stunts, emotion, and revenge collide in this stylish action thriller.
